question: Which counties from the Washington school districts that met ELA performance >= 68% for all students, all grades in each of the four school years ending in the year (within 2018-2019) that has the lowest total ridership for Bloomington Transit bus routes are in Eastern Washington? List the county names in alphabetical order separated by `, `. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Summing riders by year for 2018-2019, the minimum total is 3106507 in 2018.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2018-2019 has the lowest total ridership for Bloomington Transit bus routes? (Use ts to derive year; sum riders by year and select the minimum.)

2.fact: In the Washington Report Card Assessment Data <node_1 answer - 4>-<node_1 answer - 3 (two digits)> release, 21 school districts had ELA PercentMetStandard >= 68% for All Students, All Grades, including districts in King, Clark, Pierce, Whitman, Thurston, and Spokane counties.
2.subquestion: Which Washington school districts had ELA performance >= 68% for All Students, All Grades in the school year <node_1 answer - 4>-<node_1 answer - 3>? (Filter: OrganizationLevel=District; TestSubject=ELA; StudentGroup=All Students; GradeLevel=All Grades; PercentMetStandard>=68.)

3.fact: In the Washington Report Card Assessment Data <node_1 answer - 3>-<node_1 answer - 2 (two digits)> release, 77 school districts had ELA PercentMetStandard >= 68% for All Students, All Grades.
3.subquestion: Which Washington school districts had ELA performance >= 68% for All Students, All Grades in the school year <node_1 answer - 3>-<node_1 answer - 2>? (Filter: OrganizationLevel=District; TestSubject=ELA; StudentGroup=All Students; GradeLevel=All Grades; PercentMetStandard>=68.)

4.fact: In the Washington Report Card Assessment Data <node_1 answer - 2>-<node_1 answer - 1 (two digits)> release, 67 school districts had ELA PercentMetStandard >= 68% for All Students, All Grades.
4.subquestion: Which Washington school districts had ELA performance >= 68% for All Students, All Grades in the school year <node_1 answer - 2>-<node_1 answer - 1>? (Filter: OrganizationLevel=District; TestSubject=ELA; StudentGroup=All Students; GradeLevel=All Grades; PercentMetStandard>=68.)

5.fact: In the Washington Report Card Assessment Data <node_1 answer - 1>-<node_1 answer (two digits)> release, 56 school districts had ELA PercentMetStandard >= 68% for All Students, All Grades.
5.subquestion: Which Washington school districts had ELA performance >= 68% for All Students, All Grades in the school year <node_1 answer - 1>-<node_1 answer>? (Filter: OrganizationLevel=District; TestSubject=ELA; StudentGroup=All Students; GradeLevel=All Grades; PercentMetStandard>=68.)

6.fact: The Eastern Washington article lists Whitman County and Spokane County among the counties in Eastern Washington.
6.subquestion: Among counties from the ELA>=68% intersection (King, Clark, Pierce, Whitman, Thurston, Spokane), which are in Eastern Washington?

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Year with lowest Bloomington Transit ridership (2018-2019) -> 2018
Derived school year range: 2014-15 through 2017-18 (4 school years ending in node_1 answer)
Intersection -> counties {King, Clark, Pierce, Whitman, Thurston, Spokane}
HOP 3 (d=1, Wikipedia - node 6 depends on hop 2 counties):
Node 6: Eastern Washington counties among those -> Whitman County, Spokane County
Final answer: Spokane County, Whitman County
